svg.aria-label: Antique chart of The Quiet Isles of Pau, an archipelago in a temperate climate.
svg.title: The Quiet Isles of Pau
svg.desc: Antique chart of The Quiet Isles of Pau, an archipelago in a temperate climate.
svg.metadata: Vellum chart. Recipe: seed=47614 type=archipelago band=temperate land=0.24 grid=320x240 style=antique engine=0.1.0

g.text: Being a true & faithful chart of these waters, as surveyed
by Laka the Wayfarer in the year 532 of the Cedar Age
